name: Checkbox Group
description: Groups multiple checkboxes with shared state management.

props.name: direction
props.description: Layout direction of the grouped checkboxes.

props.name: size
props.description: Size propagated to child checkboxes that don't set their own size.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme propagated to child checkboxes that don't set their own.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum number of checkboxes that must remain checked.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum number of checkboxes that can be checked simultaneously.

props.name: values
props.description: Currently checked values. Reflects child checkbox states. Can be set programmatically.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Group label rendered above the checkboxes.
